N/A BY DEFT'S TO COURT TRIAL PER JUDGE SALAMANDO #318 BRENDA PAYTON, CLERK

ROOM 220, JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, CSAUCEDA, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 10:35 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF. PRESENT WITH COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJE, DEFTS NOT PRESENT. COURT TOOK JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL TODAY. PLTF CALLS H. SINH, SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF'S EXH. # 1 - 3 DAY NOTICE ID/EV COURT REMDERS JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF FOR REST & POSS OF THE PREM, FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE, FOR $1,200 BACK RENTS AND $599.76 DAMAGES TO A TOTAL OF $1,799.76, COSTS PER COST BILL AND A PER DIEM HOLD OVER OF $21.42 PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT, EXHIBIT W/DRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONTE, WAYNE SMITH, GAY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 51 SIXTH STREET, #511, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,799.76 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,799.76, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
